_review: DRAFT — pending author review. Historical v1 classification used for the registry-versioning demo beat (accurate pre-Dec 12, 2025).
mintNote: Paxos-published devnet PYUSD (Token-2022). Mainnet display ref: 2b1kV6DkPAnxd5ixfnxCpjxmKwqjjaYmCZfHsFu24GXo

pathwayBasis.summary: State qualified issuers are approved by a State payment stablecoin regulator; issuers ≤$10B may elect a substantially-similar state regime under §4(c).

statusBasis.summary: Paxos issued PYUSD under NYDFS trust supervision until converting to an OCC national trust charter on Dec 12, 2025 — see registry v2 for current pathway.

reserveBasis.summary: Reserves must back outstanding stablecoins at least 1:1 in enumerated assets: currency, insured deposits, ≤93-day Treasuries, repos, government MMFs.

redemptionBasis.summary: Issuer must publicly disclose a redemption policy with clear procedures for timely redemption; fee changes require at least 7 days' prior notice.
